rulings.Case Title: HEATHER DANIELS VS. MERIDIAN FORECLOSURE SERVICE, FKA MTDS INC., et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Judgmnt On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 23, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANTS DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY AND ONEWEST BANK'S Motion For Judgmnt On The Pleadings. rulings.Case Title: DMG ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. ALCIDES VALLADARES PERLA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Re Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 23, 2013, line 7. - DEFENDANT ALCIDES PERLA'S Re Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration. Defendant's Motion for Motion for Reconsideration DENIED. Defendant failed to sustain burden under CCP 1008. Defendant fails to provide any argument, law or fact warranting reconsideration based on Court's inherent authority to do so. = (501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE VS. KENNETT TAYLOR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Set Aside The Judgment Of Apr-16-2013
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 23, 2013, line 8. - DEFENDANT KENNETT TAYLOR'S Motion To Set Aside The Judgment Of Apr-16-2013. Defendant's Motion to Set Aside the Judgment is DENIED. Defendant failed to sustain burden under CCP 473(b) and/or CCP 663. Defendant failed to show fraud or extrinsic mistake. Defendant failed to comply with CRC 3.1112. = (501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: DARRIL HUDSON VS. CARLOS MAGANA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 23, 2013, line 9. - DEFENDANT CARLOS MAGANA'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Judgment DENY. Defendant failed to sustain burden under CCP 473(b).= (501/HD)

Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 23, 2013, line 10. - DEFENDANT KAEWTA RATTANABUSAYAPORN'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
